idea-plugin.name: AI.md — Context Continuity
idea-plugin.description:
Save and restore AI project context across devices and platforms.

Captures your git state, open files, tech stack, and task notes into a portable .ai.md file. Syncs via GitHub Gist, Google Drive, or local file. Works with Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, VS Code, and CLI.

Features:
  • One-click context save (Ctrl+Shift+S)
  • Auto-save on project close or focus loss
  • Git-aware: captures branch, recent commits, dirty files
  • Multi-cloud sync: GitHub Gist, Google Drive, local
  • Status bar widget showing sync state

action.description: Save current project context to .ai.md file
